summary:
There is no evidence from available medical literature linking CPX-351 to tuberculosis treatment; while other new antitubercular agents exist, CPX-351 has been neither studied nor referenced in this context. Thus, CPX-351 should not currently be considered for use in managing tuberculosis. 

Final answer: $\boxed{B}$
